content: OAuth for Next.js App Router in 2026: Better Auth is recommended default (full data ownership, immediate session revocation, code-first). Clerk is fastest setup but data lives on Clerk servers + /month at 100K MAU. Auth.js v5 is now security-patch-only (maintenance mode as of Sept 2025). For adding Google/GitHub OAuth to existing email/password, Better Auth is ideal: install package, add Google and GitHub providers, configure callback URLs in each OAuth app console (path: /api/auth/callback/google and /api/auth/callback/github). JWT sessions work without DB for early stage; swap to persistent adapter later. PKCE is handled by the library, not manually.
